programme.title: Our National Park III - EP 1 我们的国家公园 III

programme.desc: Sleek and lightweight Thermos Mug with strainer for you to enjoy your tea to the fullest. Suitable for everyday use! 一杯多用， 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Collagen Diamond Pro
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. It helps reduce fine lines and wrinkles, evens out dullness and pigmentation, and boosts elasticity and hydration—leaving skin firmer, smoother, and radiant. Kinohimitsu全新升级的 Collagen Diamond Pro 胶原蛋白饮，融合5500毫克深海胶原胜肽与NMN、白藜芦醇及虾红素，从内而外激活年轻能量。有效淡化细纹皱纹，改善暗沉与色斑，全面提升肌肤弹性与保湿力，让肌肤更紧致、水润、透亮。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot Opula Lite 4 Wheels Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: The most sleek lightweight 18kg four-wheel mobility scooter that is foldable and for overseas traveling. 18公斤四轮电动代步车，时尚轻巧可折叠，方便带出国！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - PHS HAIRSCIENCE HOM/FEM Anti-Hair Loss Bundle
programme.desc: FEM & HOM Fortify Hair Loss Bundle restore scalp health and reduce hair fall for both men and women with thinning hair concerns. FEM & HOM 防脱发套组，恢复头皮健康，减少男女头发稀疏问题。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - LAC Joint Protect
programme.desc: The jelly form LAC Joint Protec contains glucosamine, chondroitin, type 2 collagen, anti-inflammatory herbs, which help repair cartilage and relieve joint inflammation. It tastes good, is easy to take and convenient. Start ""refueling"" the cartilage and synovial fluid early so that the joints can be used for a longer time! 果冻形态的关节保健品，含葡萄糖胺、软骨素、第2型胶原蛋白、抗炎草本等关节保健营养素，有助于修复软骨和缓解关节发炎症状，味道好，容易服用又方便。提早开始给软骨和滑液“加加油”，关节才能用得久、用得顺！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Electronic Nerve Stimulator
programme.desc: Compact & intuitive design massager that allows you to treat specific pain areas wherever you are. 微电流电疗结合热敷功能，帮助舒缓疼痛的好帮手，哪里痛就贴哪里！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Livrin
programme.desc: Promotes and Enhances Liver Health with Thomson Livrin! 奶蓟精华有助维护肝脏健康、精神更佳、皮肤更美哦！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: Cheers Brother - Cheers Brother Episode 5
programme.desc: Together with actress Lee El, the group explores traditional liquors from Andong, Gyeongsangbuk-do. programme.title: Minnesota Clay
programme.desc: Wrongfully imprisoned for a crime he did not commit, Minnesota Clay seeks revenge on the man who withheld evidence at his trial. The catch: he is going blind.

programme.title: Double Target
programme.desc: After several American and British military personnel are killed in suicide attacks throughout Southeast Asia, the U.S. begins to suspect a plot by the Vietnam government. To uncover the truth, the U.S. army calls upon a former commando who is looking for his long-lost son in Vietnam. While his military commanders want to see the commando succeed in his mission, his political overseers have a different set of plans.

programme.title: Wanted Dead Or Alive
programme.desc: This movie features a character who is supposed to be the descendant of the character played Steve McQueen in the television series of the same name. And like McQueen's Josh Randall, Hauer's Nick Randall is also a bounty hunter as well as an ex-CIA operative, who is asked by his former employer to help them track down a terrorist, Malak Al Rahim.

programme.title: The Two Gladiators
programme.desc: After the death of Marcus Aurelius, an emissary is dispatched to locate his twin brother to assume the throne.

programme.title: The Treasure of Jamaica Reef
programme.desc: A suspense filled adventure-drama about the search for a treasure-laden Spanish Galleon that sank over 200 years ago.

programme.title: Sonny Boy
programme.desc: A small-town crime boss accepts delivery of a stolen car, only to find there's a baby in the back-seat. He and his transgender wife cut out the boy's tongue and raise him as a mute accomplice in their crimes. When the grown "Sonny Boy" escapes and tries to make contact with the outside world, the attention he draws to his warped family results in darkly-humored mayhem.

Together, they and their families deal with the gossipy, quarrelsome Auntie Fen and her frequent clashes with Guocheng’s father-in-law.

programme.title: A royal culinary class - A royal culinary class Lesson 1. “Guksu-bibim”
programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Guksu-bibim” which was described as a simple dish enjoyed in daily life on the book 「Puinpilji」, written in Joseon Dynasty.

programme.title: A royal culinary class - A royal culinary class Lesson 2. “Sengbogeo-eumjeok”and "Semyeon"
programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Sengbogeo-eumjeok” (Pan-Fried Abalone Skewers) and "Semyeon" (Mung Bean Noodles in Omija Honey Water).

programme.title: A royal culinary class - A royal culinary class Lesson 3. “Jang Jjanji”and "Jeonbok Chimchae"
programme.desc: We’d tried to reproduce “Jang Jjanji” (Pickled Cucumber) and "Jeonbok Chimchae" (Stuffed Abalone in Salty Water).

programme.title: The Korean Dish Expedition - The Korean Dish Expedition Ep.12
programme.desc: The heirloom cuisine of Korea’s traditional clan families carries generations of wisdom rooted in harmony with nature. programme.title: Cheers Brother - Cheers Brother Episode 5
programme.desc: Together with actress Lee El, the group explores traditional liquors from Andong, Gyeongsangbuk-do. At the ancestral home of Joseon-era scholar Nongam Yi Hyeon-bo, they taste Gayangju brewed using time-honored methods and enjoy a variety of anju that perfectly complements Andong’s renowned spirits.

programme.title: The Treasure of Jamaica Reef
programme.desc: A suspense filled adventure-drama about the search for a treasure-laden Spanish Galleon that sank over 200 years ago.

programme.title: Sonny Boy
programme.desc: A small-town crime boss accepts delivery of a stolen car, only to find there's a baby in the back-seat. He and his transgender wife cut out the boy's tongue and raise him as a mute accomplice in their crimes. When the grown "Sonny Boy" escapes and tries to make contact with the outside world, the attention he draws to his warped family results in darkly-humored mayhem.

programme.title: The Two Gladiators
programme.desc: After the death of Marcus Aurelius, an emissary is dispatched to locate his twin brother to assume the throne.

programme.title: The Hellbenders
programme.desc: After the civil war, a hell-bent Confederate Army Officer and his sons rob a Union Caravan carrying a fortune, killing every man and beast in the process. They hide the money in an empty coffin and hire a woman to pose as a widow to a dead officer to make it look official. Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.
